txt_en: The end of every winter is the blooming of spring flowers and the warmth of spring.
txt_cn: 每个冬天的句点都是春暖花开。

txt_en: Even a proverb is no proverb to you till your life has illustrated it.
txt_cn: 即便是格言，也是在你用人生将其诠释之后，才是真实的。

txt_en: Under the first full moon of the year, hearts find their way home.
txt_cn: 岁首满月下，心自有归途。

txt_en: When you have nothing to lose, it's time to gain.
txt_cn: 当你无可失去，便是收获之时。

txt_en: Take nothing on its looks; take everything on evidence.
txt_cn: 切勿以貌取人，凡事当以证据为凭。

txt_en: I didn't fall in love, I rose in it.
txt_cn: 我并非坠入爱河，而是在爱中崛起。

txt_en: Women belong in all places where decisions are being made.
txt_cn: 女性应存在于每一个决策之地。

txt_en: I am no bird, and no net ensnares me.
txt_cn: 我不是鸟儿，也无网能困住我。

txt_en: Downwards is the only way backwards.
When the past is recaptured by the imagination, breath is put back into life.
txt_cn: 当过往在想象中重现，生命便又充满了活力。

txt_en: The clearest way into the universe is through a forest wilderness.
txt_cn: 通往宇宙最清晰的路径，就是穿过森林荒野。

txt_en: Time is a river which sweeps me along, but I am the river.
txt_cn: 时间是一条裹挟我的河流，而我即是那河流。

txt_en: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
txt_cn: 未来属于那些相信自己梦想之美的人。

txt_en: The best films don't tell stories, they give you back your own.
txt_cn: 真正的好电影从不讲述故事，它们只让你看见你自己。

txt_en: Be the reason someone feels loved and believes in the goodness in people.
txt_cn: 成为让他人感受到被爱、并相信人性本善的原因。
